working_on: Cleanup-batch session: close Issue #54 (next_session_handle structured-field requirement per Pushback Cluster A from S-0097 audit). Five deliverables: schema field, archive-audit row + str_or_null shape, validate_outcome_summary_unhandled_defer() emitting four soft-warn categories, shutdown step 7b + Skill mirror + tools-validate-interpretation entries, ADR 0049 amendment (Decision 6).
declared_scope: Close GitHub Issue #54 inline. Add next_session_handle field (str | None) to engine/session/current.json schema, initialized null at eager-claim, filled at shutdown step 7b. Extend engine/tools/audit_archive_structured_fields.py REQUIRED_ARCHIVE_FIELDS with the new field row + extend shape_check() to support str_or_null shape token. New engine/tools/validate.py function validate_outcome_summary_unhandled_defer() reading current.json's outcome_summary + next_session_handle; gated to --final-check; emits four soft-warn categories per the Disposition table (outcome_summary_unhandled_defer, next_session_handle_unknown_issue, next_session_handle_unknown_session, next_session_handle_malformed); offline-graceful gh verification. Add shutdown step 7b prompt to engine/operations/session-shutdown-sequence.md + .claude/skills/session-shutdown-sequence/SKILL.md mirror; extend outcome_summary_soft_warns example block with the four new categories; add four entries to engine/operations/tools-validate-interpretation.md. Update engine/operations/session-build-lifecycle.md schema block + .claude/skills/session-build-lifecycle/SKILL.md mirror. Amend engine/adr/0049-scope-lock-at-boot-and-descope-reorder-audit-at-shutdown.md with Amendment (S-0100) introducing Decision 6. Pytests: TestOutcomeSummaryUnhandledDefer (~11 tests covering hedge/no-hedge × handle present/null/missing/malformed × verification paths × offline-graceful) + TestStrOrNullShape (3 tests). Layer 1 contract docstring on the new validator function per ADR 0038. Layer 3 cold-context review at shutdown. Standard close: STATE.md, ENGINE_LOG.md, archive S-0100.json, MemPalace diary write, validate.py 0 hard-fails.
